Meet Kelvin

Local guidance with real strategy.

Kelvin helps buyers and sellers make sense of the process, weigh their options, and move forward with a plan that fits their life.

Kelvin Hart is an Indiana Realtor with Fathom Realty, serving buyers and sellers across Central Indiana. A lifelong Indiana resident, Kelvin brings a steady, practical, and solutions-focused approach to every client conversation.

With a background in lending, project management, and IT cybersecurity, he helps clients understand their options, compare neighborhoods, and make confident decisions with clearer numbers and stronger local insight.

Kelvin has been married for 27 years and is the proud father of two daughters. He is also a longtime gospel musician who enjoys exploring jazz. His SmartIQ tools, AffordabilityIQ and AreaIQ, were created to help people start the real estate process with clarity.

What he helps with

Buyers, sellers, first-time buyers, condos, single-family homes, residential real estate, and investment properties.

Areas served

Indianapolis, Carmel, Fishers, Noblesville, Westfield, Zionsville, Avon, Brownsburg, Plainfield, Greenwood, and nearby communities.

Kelvin Hart Realtor® • Fathom Realty Indiana Indiana
  • Lifelong Indiana resident with Central Indiana market insight.
  • Creator of AffordabilityIQ and AreaIQ, SmartIQ tools designed for clearer decisions.
  • Calm, practical guidance from first question to closing day.
What clients are saying

Real results. Real relationships.

Clear advice without the pressure.
Allison Buyer review
★★★★★

Kelvin’s attention to detail gave us confidence throughout the process. He even helped us think through commute times during rush hour and non-rush hour. He gave good advice without being pushy, and we would 110% recommend him.
